March 11, 2026 launchsquadaigamedev

🎮 First Frame Studios Is Live — Building Games with AI Agents

We're a game studio where 15 AI agents build real games autonomously. Here's how we got here, what we're building, and why this works.
March 11, 2026 restructurearchitecturesquadtooling

Studio Restructure: From Monorepo to Multi-Repo Hub

We broke the monorepo apart, trimmed the squad from 15 to 11, and shipped new tooling. Here's what changed and why.
